exam_name: NBCT — Early Childhood through Young Adulthood/Exceptional Needs Specialist
exam_format: Online portfolio submission + online proctored written assessment (ProctorU)
exam_price_notes: Portfolio submission + written assessment. Score scale 75–400; passing score 275.

testing_centers.notes: Written assessment delivered online via ProctorU. Portfolio is developed and submitted online over a 3-year window.

id_requirements: One valid, unexpired government-issued photo ID. Name must match NBPTS account exactly.
exam_rules: Portfolio is open-book and developed over time outside exam conditions — no exam-day restriction. Written assessment is proctored online via ProctorU; timed and closed-book during the session. Candidates have a 3-year window to complete both portfolio and written assessment components. Score scale: 75–400; passing score: 275.
renewal_options: NBCT certification is valid for 10 years. Renewal requires submission of a renewal portfolio demonstrating continued professional growth. Renewal fee applies.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates who do not pass may bank passing component scores and retake only failing components. Full 3-year window applies; individual component retake fees may apply.
